global.description: The ad features a modern design with abstract shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to try the service for free.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes, including a circle and a square, in a muted color palette.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: A stylized logo with the text 'NeonCast' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: A prominent headline text that reads 'Exclusive tonight Start free today' in a bold, clear font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold typography, key elements include logo, headline, and CTA.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight Start free today, NeonCast, Try for free, UGC
